name: Canon EOS 5D Mark IV DSLR Camera Body
description: The Canon EOS 5D Mark IV delivers extraordinary performance with a 30.4 Megapixel full-frame CMOS sensor and DIGIC 6+ image processor. Ideal for professional photographers who demand exceptional image quality, fast autofocus, and 4K video capability.
features: Dual Pixel RAW for post-capture image adjustment

name: Nikon D850 DSLR Camera Body
description: The Nikon D850 combines a 45.7MP BSI CMOS sensor with the EXPEED 5 image processor for stunning detail and speed. This workhorse DSLR excels in landscape, studio, and event photography with its exceptional dynamic range and fast continuous shooting.
features: 4K UHD video at 30fps with full-frame readout
7 fps continuous shooting (9 fps with battery grip)

name: Canon EOS 90D DSLR Camera Body
description: The Canon EOS 90D features a 32.5 Megapixel APS-C sensor and blazing 10fps continuous shooting for capturing fast action. With Dual Pixel CMOS AF and uncropped 4K video, it is an excellent choice for enthusiasts and wildlife photographers alike.
features: Uncropped 4K UHD 30p and Full HD 120p video

name: Nikon D7500 DSLR Camera Body
description: The Nikon D7500 brings the imaging power of the D500 into a lighter, more compact DX-format body. With 20.9MP resolution, 8fps shooting, and 4K video, it delivers outstanding performance for enthusiast photographers on the move.
features: 8 fps continuous shooting with buffer depth of 50 RAW frames

name: Sony Alpha a7 IV Mirrorless Camera Body
description: The Sony a7 IV redefines the standard for full-frame mirrorless cameras with a 33MP Exmor R sensor and BIONZ XR processor. It features real-time Eye AF for humans, animals, and birds, making it the ultimate hybrid camera for photo and video creators.
features: 759-point phase-detection AF with Real-time Eye AF

name: Sony Alpha a7R V Mirrorless Camera Body
description: The Sony a7R V pushes resolution to new heights with a 61MP full-frame sensor and AI-based autofocus powered by a dedicated processing unit. Its 8-stop IBIS and 8K oversampled 4K video make it the ultimate tool for demanding professionals.
features: AI-based Real-time Recognition AF for humans, animals, birds, insects, cars, and trains

name: Fujifilm X-T5 Mirrorless Camera Body
description: The Fujifilm X-T5 is a photography-focused mirrorless camera built around a 40.2MP X-Trans CMOS 5 HR sensor and X-Processor 5. With its classic rangefinder-style design, 3-way tilting LCD, and renowned Fujifilm color science, it is perfect for street, travel, and portrait work.
features: Up to 15 fps mechanical shutter / 20 fps electronic
19 Film Simulation modes including Nostalgic Neg

name: Panasonic LUMIX S5 II Mirrorless Camera Body
description: The Panasonic LUMIX S5 II marks a new era with phase-detection autofocus, a 24.2MP full-frame sensor, and advanced video capabilities. It delivers C4K 60p 4:2:2 10-bit internal recording and Active I.S. for smooth handheld footage.
features: 24.2MP full-frame CMOS sensor with phase-detection AF
Active I.S. with 5-axis dual image stabilization
Real-time subject recognition for humans, animals, vehicles
Dual native ISO for outstanding low-light performance

name: Canon EOS R6 Mark II Mirrorless Camera Body
description: The Canon EOS R6 Mark II is a versatile full-frame mirrorless camera with a 24.2MP sensor and DIGIC X processor. Offering 40fps electronic shutter, advanced subject tracking, and 6K oversampled 4K 60p video, it excels in both stills and motion.
features: Deep learning-based subject detection and tracking AF
Up to 8 stops of in-body image stabilization

name: DJI Mavic 3 Pro Fly More Combo
description: The DJI Mavic 3 Pro is the first tri-camera drone featuring a Hasselblad main camera, a medium tele, and a tele camera for unmatched aerial versatility. With up to 43 minutes of flight time and omnidirectional obstacle sensing, it redefines professional aerial imaging.
features: Tri-camera system: 4/3 CMOS Hasselblad + 1/1.3-inch medium tele + 1/2-inch tele
Up to 43 minutes of flight time
Fly More Combo includes 3 batteries, charging hub, ND filters, and shoulder bag

name: DJI Mini 4 Pro Fly More Combo (DJI RC 2)
description: The DJI Mini 4 Pro weighs under 249g so no FAA registration is required for recreational use, yet it delivers 4K/60fps HDR video and omnidirectional obstacle sensing. Its compact, foldable design and intelligent flight modes make it the ideal travel drone.
features: Under 249g takeoff weight - no FAA registration required for recreation
Up to 34 minutes of flight time

name: DJI Air 3 Fly More Combo with DJI RC-N2
description: The DJI Air 3 features dual primary cameras with wide-angle and 3x medium telephoto lenses, each with a 1/1.3-inch sensor. With 46 minutes of flight time and waypoint flying, it bridges the gap between the Mini and Mavic series.
features: Dual-camera system: wide-angle + 3x medium tele, both 1/1.3-inch 48MP
Up to 46 minutes of flight time
Fly More Combo includes 3 batteries, charging hub, and shoulder bag

name: DJI Avata 2 Fly More Combo
description: The DJI Avata 2 is an immersive FPV drone designed for thrilling first-person view flying with DJI Goggles 3 and the RC Motion 3 controller. Its lightweight, compact build with propeller guards makes it safe for both indoor and outdoor flight.
features: 4K/60fps video with 10-bit D-Log M color profile
Ultra-wide 155-degree FOV for immersive FPV footage
Built-in propeller guards for safe indoor flight
Fly More Combo includes DJI Goggles 3, RC Motion 3, 3 batteries

name: GoPro HERO13 Black
description: The GoPro HERO13 Black features a new 1/1.9-inch sensor, HyperSmooth 6.0 stabilization, and magnetic mounting via the new Lux Mod lens system. Capture stunning 5.3K60 video and burst slow-motion at up to 400fps in 720p.
features: Magnetic Lux Mod lens system with interchangeable lenses

name: GoPro HERO12 Black
description: The GoPro HERO12 Black delivers 5.3K60 video with HDR, HyperSmooth 6.0, and Bluetooth audio support for wireless microphones. Its improved thermal performance enables longer recording times, making it ideal for extended adventures.
features: Max Lens Mod 2.0 support for 177-degree ultra-wide FOV
Bluetooth audio for wireless microphone connectivity

name: DJI Osmo Action 4 Standard Combo
description: The DJI Osmo Action 4 features a 1/1.3-inch sensor for exceptional low-light action footage, along with 4K/120fps recording and RockSteady 3.0+ stabilization. Its magnetic quick-release mount and 18m waterproof rating make it ready for any adventure.

name: Sony FE 24-70mm f/2.8 GM II Lens
description: The Sony FE 24-70mm f/2.8 GM II is the world's lightest f/2.8 standard zoom lens in its class, delivering outstanding resolving power with minimal aberrations. With four XD Linear Motors for fast, precise AF and a close-focus distance of just 0.21m, it is a must-have for professional Sony shooters.
features: Constant f/2.8 maximum aperture throughout zoom range
Four XD Linear Motors for fast, quiet autofocus

name: Canon RF 70-200mm f/2.8L IS USM Lens
description: The Canon RF 70-200mm f/2.8L IS USM is a compact, high-performance telephoto zoom lens designed for Canon's RF-mount mirrorless system. Its internal zoom design, 5-stop optical image stabilization, and fast Dual Nano USM motors make it indispensable for sports, portraits, and events.
features: Constant f/2.8 aperture with compact internal zoom design
5-stop optical image stabilization (up to 7.5 stops with IBIS bodies)
Dual Nano USM for fast, silent autofocus
Minimum focus distance of 0.7m throughout zoom range

name: Manfrotto Befree Advanced Carbon Fiber Travel Tripod with Ball Head
description: The Manfrotto Befree Advanced is a lightweight carbon fiber travel tripod that folds down to just 16 inches while extending to 59 inches. Its 494 ball head with 200PL-PRO plate delivers smooth, precise positioning for cameras up to 19.8 lbs.
features: Carbon fiber construction weighing just 2.89 lbs
Folds to 16 inches for easy transport
Extends to maximum height of 59 inches

name: SanDisk Extreme PRO 256GB SDXC UHS-I Memory Card
description: The SanDisk Extreme PRO 256GB SDXC card delivers read speeds up to 200MB/s and write speeds up to 140MB/s for fast shot-to-shot performance. With UHS Speed Class 3 and Video Speed Class 30 ratings, it is designed for 4K UHD video and rapid burst-mode photography.
features: Read speeds up to 200MB/s, write speeds up to 140MB/s
UHS Speed Class 3 (U3) and Video Speed Class 30 (V30)
Ideal for 4K UHD video recording and burst-mode photos
RescuePRO Deluxe data recovery software included
